title: Jack Black Narrates EVERYTHING
description: This mod plays clips from the Minecraft movie trailers and teasers to fit with your actions in your game!
body:
This mod plays clips from the Minecraft movie trailers and teasers to fit with your actions in your game!

The mod is pretty small so far, but once I can get more sound files from the movie, I will expand it!

(This is my first mod so expect bugs and really janky stuff, but it has gone smooth in testing)
